title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two people talking about a town festival.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you going to the town festival on Saturday? || Man: Maybe. I went last year, but it was hard to find out what was happening. || Woman: They've made a better website this time. || Man: Good. I don't mind crowds, and the music was great. [8]The problem was that events changed places, and there weren't enough signs to guide people[/8]. || Woman: I heard they are putting up maps this year. || Man: Then I'll probably go. || Woman: I hadn't thought of that. || Man: Neither had I at first, but now it seems obvious.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you going to the town festival on Saturday?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Maybe. I went last year, but it was hard to find out what was happening.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: They've made a better website this time.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good. I don't mind crowds, and the music was great. The problem was that events changed places, and there weren't enough signs to guide people.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I heard they are putting up maps this year.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Then I'll probably go.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I hadn't thought of that.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Neither had I at first, but now it seems obvious.

questions.question: What problem did the man have at last year's festival?

options.C: It was difficult to find events.

questions.explanation: He says events changed places and there were not enough signs.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman telling a friend about a new hobby.
extracts.audio_script: Man: I hear you've started painting. Are you enjoying it? || Woman: Very much. I thought I'd be embarrassed because I'm not very good, but the class is friendly. || Man: Do you paint landscapes? || Woman: Sometimes, but [9]I really like painting small objects from my kitchen, like cups or fruit. They're simple, and I can practise light and colour[/9]. || Man: That sounds relaxing. || Woman: It is, especially after work. || Man: That must be useful. || Woman: It is, especially when there are several things to think about.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I hear you've started painting. Are you enjoying it?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Very much. I thought I'd be embarrassed because I'm not very good, but the class is friendly.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Do you paint landscapes?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Sometimes, but I really like painting small objects from my kitchen, like cups or fruit. They're simple, and I can practise light and colour.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds relaxing.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It is, especially after work.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That must be useful.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It is, especially when there are several things to think about.

questions.question: What does the woman enjoy painting most?
questions.explanation: She says she really likes painting small objects from her kitchen.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a charity run.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you doing the charity run next month? || Man: Yes, though I haven't trained enough. || Woman: Is it a long race? || Man: Only five kilometres, so I should finish. [10]I'm more worried about asking people for money. I don't like feeling as if I'm pushing friends to donate[/10]. || Woman: You could share the link once and leave it there. || Man: That's a good idea. || Woman: That sounds sensible. || Man: Yes, I think it will make things much easier next time.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you doing the charity run next month?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, though I haven't trained enough.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Is it a long race?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Only five kilometres, so I should finish. I'm more worried about asking people for money. I don't like feeling as if I'm pushing friends to donate.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: You could share the link once and leave it there.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's a good idea.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, I think it will make things much easier next time.

questions.question: What is the man worried about?
questions.explanation: He says he is worried about asking people for money.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking to a colleague about a training video.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you watch the new safety training video? || Woman: Yes. I expected it to be boring, but it was quite clear. || Man: Was it too long? || Woman: Not really. [11]What helped was the use of real examples from our building, because I could imagine exactly what to do in an emergency[/11]. || Man: I agree. Videos with actors usually feel less useful. || Woman: This one felt practical. || Man: I can see why. || Woman: Yes, it wasn't what I expected, but I learnt something useful.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you watch the new safety training video?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes. I expected it to be boring, but it was quite clear.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Was it too long?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Not really. What helped was the use of real examples from our building, because I could imagine exactly what to do in an emergency.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. Videos with actors usually feel less useful.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: This one felt practical.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I can see why.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, it wasn't what I expected, but I learnt something useful.

questions.question: What did the woman like about the training video?
questions.explanation: She says real examples from their building helped her understand what to do.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a garden.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Your garden looks different. Did you plant those flowers yourself? || Woman: Yes, but they need more care than I expected. || Man: They look beautiful. || Woman: Thanks. [12]I chose them because bees and butterflies like them, not just because of the colours[/12]. || Man: That's a nice idea. || Woman: I want the garden to be useful for wildlife, even though it means doing a bit more work. || Man: Good idea. || Woman: I'll do that, and then I won't have to worry about it again.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Your garden looks different. Did you plant those flowers yourself?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but they need more care than I expected.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: They look beautiful.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks. I chose them because bees and butterflies like them, not just because of the colours.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's a nice idea.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I want the garden to be useful for wildlife, even though it means doing a bit more work.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good idea.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I'll do that, and then I won't have to worry about it again.

questions.question: Why did the woman choose the flowers?

options.A: They are easy to look after.

questions.explanation: She says bees and butterflies like the flowers.

extracts.context: You will hear a man telling a friend about a computer problem.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Did you finish your report? || Man: Eventually. My computer kept freezing last night. || Woman: Did you lose anything? || Man: Luckily no. I save my work often. [13]The annoying thing was waiting for it to restart again and again. It took twice as long to finish[/13]. || Woman: You should get it checked. || Man: I will. I can't work like that every evening. || Woman: That makes sense. || Man: Exactly, and I feel much happier about it now. || Woman: I understand. || Man: Thanks.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you finish your report?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Eventually. My computer kept freezing last night.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you lose anything?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Luckily no. I save my work often. The annoying thing was waiting for it to restart again and again. It took twice as long to finish.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: You should get it checked.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I will. I can't work like that every evening.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That makes sense.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly, and I feel much happier about it now.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I understand.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Thanks.

questions.question: What annoyed the man about the computer problem?

options.A: He lost part of his report.
options.B: It wasted a lot of his time.
options.C: He could not save his work.

questions.explanation: He says waiting for restarts made the report take twice as long.
